title: HIGHLIGHT feature
excerpt: Adding the ability to highlight an entire cell - similar to excel.

posts.author: kyrinfield (Kyrin Field)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding the ability to highlight an entire cell - similar to excel.

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @kyrinfield

I had requested this one a while back. Are you referring to having something like this? Thanks!

Column Color Shading Feature requests
Hi Monday.com community! I have a very massive board and in the board several Columns are clustered together to capture certain data. I was just thinking that it would be super awesome If we could (Select MULTIPLE Columns) and have a setting to color shade the columns … that way we can have a nice visual of the clusters / phases. This is what I mean. Current view … [image] with the feature view … [image]

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml:
there is also the suggestion to have Monday.com to add the ROW highlight … I think that’s the one you are referring to. @kyrinfield

Pulse Selection Visualization enhancement Feature requests
We have several massive boards that have a couple hundred pulses and would love it if once I select a pulse/multiple pulses, the back light of the pulse become stronger so that I know what pulse(s) have been selected. Currently as far as I can tell, there is no back light color that changes when you select the pulse(s). Just a visual enhancement that I think (hope) all would appreciate [image]

posts.author: Binatica (Binatica)
